command:
echo '=== INFRASTRUCTURE PING SWEEP ==='
for ip in 192.168.0.191 192.168.0.192 192.168.0.199 192.168.0.201 192.168.0.202 192.168.0.203 192.168.0.204 192.168.0.205 192.168.0.39 192.168.0.106; do
  if ping -c1 -W1 $ip > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  $ip: UP"
  else
    echo "  $ip: DOWN"
  fi
done

echo '=== OLLAMA 3090 (192.168.0.39) ==='
curl -s http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
models=[m['name'] for m in d.get('models',[])]
print(f'  Models ({len(models)}): {models}')
" 2>/dev/null || echo "  UNREACHABLE"

echo '=== OLLAMA 3060 (192.168.0.106) ==='
curl -s http://192.168.0.106:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
models=[m['name'] for m in d.get('models',[])]
print(f'  Models ({len(models)}): {models}')
" 2>/dev/null || echo "  UNREACHABLE"

echo DONE_1883
